body:
> [!NOTE] > Currently processing new changes in this PR. This may take a few minutes, please wait... > >
> ⚙️ Run configuration > > **Configuration used**: Organization UI > > **Review profile**: CHILL > > **Plan**: Pro > > **Run ID**: `327603f1-c7bb-497b-ab5d-db59fb3c4603` > >
> >
> 📥 Commits > > Reviewing files that changed from the base of the PR and between 2e104a9b952e8be43180cc4cd772feb71f1a93ef and 4f2ee25ba6d2f9510f0ffb009dafa21c091b9a38. > >
> >
> 📒 Files selected for processing (2) > > * `src/cli/inbox-lock.test.ts` > * `src/cli/inbox-lock.ts` > >
> > ```ascii > __________________ > < I see dead code. > > ------------------ > \ > \ (\__/) > (•ㅅ•) > / 　 づ > ```
📝 Walkthrough ## Walkthrough このプルリクエストは、リポジトリケースの正規化、ローカルファイルベースの順序保証ロック機構の導入、古い一時ワークツリーの自動クリーンアップにより、インボックス操作の堅牢性を向上させます。 ## Changes |Cohort / File(s)|Summary| |---|---| |**Worktree Pruning**
`src/actions/branch.ts`, `src/actions/branch.test.ts`|新しい内部関数 `pruneStaleWorktrees()` を追加し、新規インボックスワークツリー作成前に古いワークツリーをクリーンアップします。テストにより、プルーン操作が非オーファンワークツリー追加の前に実行されることを検証。| |**Repo Normalization**
`src/cli/parse-repo.ts`, `src/cli/parse-repo.test.ts`|`parseRepo()` と `inferRepoFromRemote()` に所有者/リポジトリ名を小文字に正規化するロジックを追加。大文字混在入力も同じインボックスパスに解決されることを確保。| |**Inbox Mutation Lock**
`src/cli/inbox-lock.ts`, `src/cli/inbox-lock.test.ts`|ファイルベースの相互排除機構を備えた新しいモジュール `withInboxMutationLock()` を導入。同時実行インボックス変更の競合を検出し、ロック保有中は次の変更を高速で失敗させます。| |**Claim Command Integration**
`src/cli/commands/claim.ts`, `src/cli/commands/claim.test.ts`|クレーム操作全体をインボックス変更ロックでラップ。ロック取得失敗時やロック競合時の動作をテストで検証。| |**Resolve Command Integration**
`src/cli/commands/resolve.ts`, `src/cli/commands/resolve.test.ts`|リゾルブ操作全体をインボックス変更ロックでラップ。正規化されたowner/repoでロックを保持し、ロック競合を適切に処理。| |**List Command Tests**
`src/cli/commands/list.test.ts`|`readInboxFromBranch()` のパス構築に小文字正規化を適用するテストを追加。| ## Sequence Diagram(s) ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant CLI as CLI Command
(claim/resolve) participant Lock as Inbox Mutation
Lock Module participant FS as Filesystem participant Git as Git/Worktree participant Repo as Repository
Operations CLI->>CLI: Normalize owner/repo
to lowercase CLI->>Lock: withInboxMutationLock
(normalized target,
operation) Lock->>Git: Resolve git
common directory Lock->>FS: Create lock directory Lock->>FS: Attempt lock file
creation (wx mode) alt Lock Already Held FS-->>Lock: EEXIST error Lock-->>CLI: Throw lock contention
error else Lock Acquired FS-->>Lock: Lock file created Lock->>Repo: Execute mutation
operation Repo->>Git: Prune stale worktrees Repo->>Git: Ensure inbox branch Repo->>FS: Read/write JSONL/MD Repo->>Git: Commit and push Repo-->>Lock: Operation complete Lock->>FS: Cleanup worktree Lock->>FS: Remove lock file Lock-->>CLI: Return result end ``` ## Estimated code review effort 🎯 3 (Moderate) | ⏱️ ~25 minutes ## Possibly related PRs - **ToaruPen/Yamabiko-lite#1**: `src/actions/branch.ts` ワークツリーロジックに関連。既存の `ensureInboxBranch` 実装に新しい `pruneStaleWorktrees()` 呼び出しを追加するため、コード依存性が強い。 ## Poem > 🐰 ロックをかけ、ケースを揃え、 > 古きツリー払いて清し、 > インボックスの混乱よ去れ、 > 順序守りて安心なり。 > 変更の群れ、もう迷わず🎀
🚥 Pre-merge checks | ✅ 4 | ❌ 1 ### ❌ Failed checks (1 warning) | Check name | Status | Explanation | Resolution | | :----------------: | :--------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Docstring Coverage | ⚠️ Warning | Docstring coverage is 0.00% which is insufficient. The required threshold is 80.00%. | Write docstrings for the functions missing them to satisfy the coverage threshold. |
✅ Passed checks (4 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :------------------------: | :------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Description Check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped - CodeRabbit’s high-level summary is enabled. | | Title check | ✅ Passed | タイトルはリポジトリ正規化、ロック機構、ワークツリーの剪定という3つの主要な変更を総合的に要約しており、PR全体の目的を明確に表現しています。 | | Linked Issues check | ✅ Passed | すべての受け入れ基準が実装されています。リポジトリ識別子の正規化、ローカルロック機構、ワークツリーの剪定、既存フローの保全がすべて満たされています。 | | Out of Scope Changes check | ✅ Passed | すべての変更がissue `#7で定義された範囲内です`。リポジトリ識別子の正規化、ローカルロック機構、ワークツリー剪定、テストの追加のみで、追加の機能追加や範囲外の変更はありません。 |
✏️ Tip: You can configure your own custom pre-merge checks in the settings.
✨ Finishing Touches - [ ] 📝 Generate docstrings (stacked PR) - [ ] 📝 Generate docstrings (commit on current branch)
🧪 Generate unit tests (beta) - [ ] Create PR with unit tests - [ ] Post copyable unit tests in a comment - [ ] Commit unit tests in branch `issue-7-inbox-robustness`
📝 Coding Plan - [ ] Generate coding plan for human review comments
--- Comment `@coderabbitai help` to get the list of available commands and usage tips.

<details>
<summary>✅ Actions performed</summary>

Review triggered.

> Note: CodeRabbit is an incremental review system and does not re-review already reviewed commits. This command is applicable only when automatic reviews are paused.

</details>

**Actionable comments posted: 2**
🧹 Nitpick comments (1)
src/cli/commands/resolve.ts (1)
`54-118`: **`claim.ts` との重複コードの抽出を検討してください。** 以下のロジックが両ファイルで重複しています： - JSONL整合性チェック（行数比較） - ワークツリークリーンアップとエラーハンドリング - ロックラッパー使用パターン 将来的なメンテナンス性向上のため、共通ユーティリティへの抽出を検討できます（例：`withMutationWorkflow` ヘルパー）。ただし、このPRのスコープでは必須ではありません。
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In `@src/cli/commands/resolve.ts` around lines 54 - 118, There is duplicated mutation workflow logic between resolve.ts and claim.ts (JSONL integrity check, worktree cleanup/error handling, lock wrapper); extract this into a shared helper (e.g. withMutationWorkflow) that: accepts parameters (branch, jsonlPath, mdPath, prNumber, owner/name, id, desiredStatus) and a mutation callback that receives parsed records and recordIndex; moves the JSONL integrity check (using readFileFromBranch + parseInboxRecords + the rawLineCount comparison), worktree setup (mkdir, writeJsonlFile, Bun.write with generateMarkdownSummary), commit/push via commitAndPushInbox, and the cleanup/error-wrapping logic (cleanupWorktree try/catch) into the helper so resolve.ts only calls withMutationWorkflow and provides the specific record mutation, ensuring you reference parseInboxRecords, readFileFromBranch, writeJsonlFile, generateMarkdownSummary, commitAndPushInbox, and cleanupWorktree when locating code to extract. ```
🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. Inline comments: In `@src/cli/inbox-lock.test.ts`: - Around line 20-37: The test is checking the wrong lock directory; update the assertions in the "releases the lock" test that use lockDirectory/rootDirectory to point to the actual implementation path (rootDirectory/yamabiko-lite/locks) used by withInboxMutationLock: compute lockDir as path.join(rootDirectory, "yamabiko-lite", "locks") (or derive it the same way the implementation does), call mkdir on that directory and assert readdir(lockDir) is empty so the test actually verifies the real lock file location after calling withInboxMutationLock. In `@src/cli/inbox-lock.ts`: - Around line 28-34: The catch is currently catching errors from both open(lockPath, "wx") and operation(), which can misclassify an EEXIST thrown inside operation() as a lock-conflict; change the flow so open(lockPath, "wx") is awaited inside its own try/catch and only errors from that call are passed to isLockAlreadyHeldError (use the existing isLockAlreadyHeldError(lockErr) and buildLockErrorMessage(target) logic), then, after successful open and storing lockHandle, call operation() outside that catch (with its own error handling as needed), and ensure any opened lockHandle is cleaned up on operation failure or before rethrowing. Ensure references to open, lockHandle, operation, isLockAlreadyHeldError, buildLockErrorMessage, lockPath, and target are updated accordingly. --- Nitpick comments: In `@src/cli/commands/resolve.ts`: - Around line 54-118: There is duplicated mutation workflow logic between resolve.ts and claim.ts (JSONL integrity check, worktree cleanup/error handling, lock wrapper); extract this into a shared helper (e.g. withMutationWorkflow) that: accepts parameters (branch, jsonlPath, mdPath, prNumber, owner/name, id, desiredStatus) and a mutation callback that receives parsed records and recordIndex; moves the JSONL integrity check (using readFileFromBranch + parseInboxRecords + the rawLineCount comparison), worktree setup (mkdir, writeJsonlFile, Bun.write with generateMarkdownSummary), commit/push via commitAndPushInbox, and the cleanup/error-wrapping logic (cleanupWorktree try/catch) into the helper so resolve.ts only calls withMutationWorkflow and provides the specific record mutation, ensuring you reference parseInboxRecords, readFileFromBranch, writeJsonlFile, generateMarkdownSummary, commitAndPushInbox, and cleanupWorktree when locating code to extract. ```
---
ℹ️ Review info
⚙️ Run configuration **Configuration used**: Organization UI **Review profile**: CHILL **Plan**: Pro **Run ID**: `49bfe3e7-ee09-4a7a-8624-45e9523d3ac1`
📥 Commits Reviewing files that changed from the base of the PR and between f788fbc0ff98bf6950d5fae8ddbc7b509e21385d and 2e104a9b952e8be43180cc4cd772feb71f1a93ef.
📒 Files selected for processing (11) * `src/actions/branch.test.ts` * `src/actions/branch.ts` * `src/cli/commands/claim.test.ts` * `src/cli/commands/claim.ts` * `src/cli/commands/list.test.ts` * `src/cli/commands/resolve.test.ts` * `src/cli/commands/resolve.ts` * `src/cli/inbox-lock.test.ts` * `src/cli/inbox-lock.ts` * `src/cli/parse-repo.test.ts` * `src/cli/parse-repo.ts`

_⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟠 Major_

**`releases the lock` テストが実際のロック格納先を検証していません。**

Line 20 の検証先が `rootDirectory/locks` ですが、実装は `rootDirectory/yamabiko-lite/locks` です。現状だと lock ファイルが残留していてもこのテストは通る可能性があります。  


<details>
<summary>🔧 提案差分</summary>

```diff
-    const lockDirectory = path.join(rootDirectory, "locks");
+    const lockDirectory = path.join(rootDirectory, "yamabiko-lite", "locks");
@@
-    await mkdir(lockDirectory, { recursive: true });
-    expect(await readdir(lockDirectory)).toEqual([]);
+    expect(await readdir(lockDirectory)).toEqual([]);
```
</details>

<!-- suggestion_start -->

<details>
<summary>📝 Committable suggestion</summary>

> ‼️ **IMPORTANT**
> Carefully review the code before committing. Ensure that it accurately replaces the highlighted code, contains no missing lines, and has no issues with indentation. Thoroughly test & benchmark the code to ensure it meets the requirements.

```suggestion
    const lockDirectory = path.join(rootDirectory, "yamabiko-lite", "locks");

    const result = await withInboxMutationLock(
      {
        branch: "yamabiko-lite-inbox",
        owner: "owner",
        prNumber: 1,
        repo: "repo",
      },
      async () => "ok",
      {
        getGitCommonDirectory: async () => rootDirectory,
      },
    );

    expect(result).toBe("ok");
    await mkdir(lockDirectory, { recursive: true });
    expect(await readdir(lockDirectory)).toEqual([]);
```

</details>

<!-- suggestion_end -->

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

In `@src/cli/inbox-lock.test.ts` around lines 20 - 37, The test is checking the
wrong lock directory; update the assertions in the "releases the lock" test that
use lockDirectory/rootDirectory to point to the actual implementation path
(rootDirectory/yamabiko-lite/locks) used by withInboxMutationLock: compute
lockDir as path.join(rootDirectory, "yamabiko-lite", "locks") (or derive it the
same way the implementation does), call mkdir on that directory and assert
readdir(lockDir) is empty so the test actually verifies the real lock file
location after calling withInboxMutationLock.
```

</details>
